title: Frankenstein vs. Baragon
writer: Reuben Bercovitch, Takeshi Kimura, John Meredyth Lucas
actors: Nick Adams, Kumi Mizuno, Tadao Takashima
plot: An American scientist and his Japanese colleagues study a feral boy born from the radiated heart of Frankenstein's monster, while a subterranean dinosaur ravages the Japanese countryside.
